info.title: dotnet evergreen
info.description: A dotnet global tool runner that automatically updates the tool package before running it, checks for updates while it runs, and restarts the tool as needed after updating it.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Run an evergreen version of a tool

options.name: --source
options.description: NuGet feed to check for updates. [default: https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json]

options.name: --singleton
options.description: Ensure a single tool process is running.

options.name: --interval
options.description: Time interval in seconds for the update checks. [default: 5]

options.name: --exit
options.description: Automatically exit if tool exits. [default: True]

options.name: --force
options.description: Stop all running tool processes to apply updates. [default: True]

options.name: --prerelease
options.description: Whether to include pre-release packages. [default: False]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Do not display any informational messages.

arguments.name: tool
arguments.description: Package Id of tool to run.

arguments.name: args
arguments.description: Additional arguments and options supported by the tool
